name: claude-code-ctx
description: Marketplace hosting the ctx plugin — Claude Code context manager with memory engine, hooks + MCP integration, and system-prompt bloat audit.

plugins.name: ctx
plugins.description: Context manager: token monitoring, auto-snapshot + JSONL backup, tailored /compact prompt, BM25 snapshot search, 9 MCP tools (ctx_ask, ctx_shell, ctx_read, ctx_grep, ctx_cache_get + memory), PreToolUse guardrails, bloat audit. Zero runtime deps, no LLM calls.
